posts.author: Abarad (Alon Barad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I would like to be able to limit rows view permission using people column

I would like every employee in my team to be able to see just his own tasks, and me, as a team leader (board admin) to be able to view the whole board.

Thanks!
